sigWerErrors.reason: The only difference is the accent mark; in context, both are understood as 'when' and do not change the meaning of the sentence.
'Listo' (masculine) and 'lista' (feminine) both mean 'ready'; the gender change may refer to the subject, but does not alter the overall meaning of the sentence.
